headline: Why Paramount (PSKY) Stock Is Falling Today
summary: Shares of multinational media and entertainment corporation Paramount (NASDAQ:PSKY) fell 8.4% in the afternoon session after Bank of America lowered its price target for the company, compounding concerns about its financial health following a major acquisition.

headline: YouTube surpasses Disney, Paramount, WBD in 2025 ad revenue
summary: YouTube pulled in $40.4 billion in ad revenue last year, which is more than Disney, NBC, Paramount, and Warner Bros. Discovery combined.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Underperform on Paramount Skydance, Lowers Price Target to $11
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Jessica Reif Ehrlich   maintains Paramount Skydance (NASDAQ:PSKY) with a Underperform and lowers the price target from $13 to $11.
